ham.subject: Scheduled Maintenance Notification – Azure IaaS – 12:00 AM PST
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that Microsoft Azure will conduct scheduled maintenance on the Azure Compute Region West US-2 on March 10 2026 from 12:00 AM to 2:00 AM PST. The maintenance involves a brief outage of virtual machine host nodes which may affect running workloads.

To mitigate impacts, we recommend pausing non‑critical VMs, checking backup status, and reducing auto‑scaling activity. The maintenance window is expected to be no longer than 1.5 hours, but we will notify you if any extension is needed.

Thank you for your cooperation.

IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Your AWS Account Suspended – Verify Quickly
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Your Amazon Web Services account has been flagged for suspicious activity. As a security measure, we have temporarily suspended your account to protect your data. If you do not verify your identity within the next 24 hours, your account will be permanently closed and all associated data will be irretrievable.

To confirm your identity, please click the verification link below and provide the required information:

<URL>

Once verified, your account will be reinstated.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Amazon Web Services Security Team
